Variables.Name: bCreatePackagePerAsset
Variables.Description: Whether to create separate packages for each generated asset. All in map package otherwise

Variables.Name: DetailsPercentage
Variables.Description: Percentage of details for static mesh proxy

Variables.Name: LandscapeExportLOD
Variables.Description: Landscape LOD to use for static mesh generation, when not specified 'Max LODLevel' from landscape actor will be used

Variables.Name: bBakeFoliageToLandscape
Variables.Description: Whether to bake foliage into landscape static mesh texture

Variables.Name: bBakeGrassToLandscape
Variables.Description: Whether to bake grass into landscape static mesh texture

Variables.Name: bUseLandscapeCulling
Variables.Description: Whether or not to use available landscape geometry to cull away invisible triangles

Variables.Name: LandscapeCullingPrecision
Variables.Description: Level of detail of the landscape that should be used for the culling

Variables.Name: UnresolvedGeometryColor
Variables.Description: Base color assigned to LOD geometry that can't be associated with the source geometry: e.g. doors and windows that have been closed by the Merge Distance

Variables.Name: bReuseMeshLightmapUVs
Variables.Description: Whether to attempt to re-use the source mesh's lightmap UVs when baking the material or always generate a new set.

Variables.Name: bUseHardAngleThreshold
Variables.Description: Enable the use of hard angle based vertex splitting

Variables.Name: HardAngleThreshold
Variables.Description: Angle at which a hard edge is introduced between faces

Variables.Name: NormalCalculationMethod
Variables.Description: Controls the method used to calculate the normal for the simplified geometry

Variables.Name: ExpectedQualityLimit
Variables.Description: Render quality control for certain devicesplatforms, if limit > actual, primitive won't be rendered.
